message:
Refactor PhaseTracker to shared util with Drop-based auto-completion

Consolidates duplicated PhaseTracker implementations from e2e_cli_flows.rs
and e2e_error_recovery.rs into a shared implementation in tests/util/e2e_log.rs.

Key improvements:

1. PhaseTracker now requires module_name and test_name at construction
   - New signature: PhaseTracker::new("module_name", "test_name")
   - Creates proper E2eTestInfo with file/line context

2. Added Drop implementation for auto-completion
   - If test doesn't explicitly call complete() or fail(), Drop handler
     automatically logs the test result
   - Detects panics via std::thread::panicking() and logs as "fail"
   - Prevents orphaned test starts without corresponding ends
   - Uses internal `completed` flag to avoid double-logging

3. Test files now use the shared implementation
   - e2e_cli_flows.rs: Uses PhaseTracker::new("e2e_cli_flows", "setup_indexed_env")
   - e2e_error_recovery.rs: Adds tracker_for() helper for consistent naming
   - Removes 100+ lines of duplicated code

This ensures all E2E tests have consistent phase tracking and proper cleanup
even when tests panic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
